case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. LEELA PRABU

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PRABU, LEELA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CRC 3.740 REVIEW

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-12-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID BY PLAINTIFF ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT) (TRANSACTION ID # 100118919) FILED BY DEFENDANT PRABU, LEELA
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE ACTION (TRANSACTION ID # 100118919) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRABU, LEELA $2,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $515.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,065.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-16-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
